---
id: execute-device-command-await
title: "Send Command to Device and Wait for Response"
description: "Control the device via command and obtain the device's response from the server. <br />"
sidebar_label: "Send Command to Device and Wait for Response"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send Command to Device and Wait for Response"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute/await"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Control the device via command and obtain the device's response from the server. <br />
The following commands can receive responses: <br />
`APIGetIrDeviceCategoriesForApp(40263)`  
`APIGetBrandsByCategoryForApp(40267)`  
`APIGetMatchTreeForApp(40268)`  
`APIClickIrKeyForApp(40273)`  
`APISaveMatchedRemoteInfoForApp(40292)`  
`SetIRDeviceInfo(40288)`  
`IRCodeMatchStatus(20591)`  
`APICreateIrVirtualDeviceForApp(40281)`  
`SendIrKey(40305)`
`APIStartIrLearningForApp(40280)`  
`IRLearnResult(20618)`  
`APIAddIrKeyForApp(40275)`     


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code, e.g.: NetworkCommissioning"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"Command code, e.g.: TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Command parameters","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"Field code"},"value":{"description":"Field value. The type is consistent with the parameter.type of the corresponding field.","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"Command field object list"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},{"type":"object","properties":{"timeoutMs":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"Timeout for waiting for device command report (milliseconds); if not provided, the server default is used.","minimum":1000,"maximum":10000}}}],"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommandAwait":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}],"timeoutMs":5000}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
